description: One of several named villas in the territory of Albiga that Desiderius of Cahors gave, from his inheritance, to the church. Its precise location cannot be determined today; BAtlas tentatively places it in the area of modern Peyregoux.
details: The Barrington Atlas Directory notes: Peyregoux? FRA

properties.title: OSM Location: modern territory of Peyregoux
